mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (session_id, role, content, meta_json) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{metaJson})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id AS sessionId, role, content, meta_json AS metaJson, created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_message WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_message WHERE id = #{id} AND session_id = #{sessionId}
